message:
Extract symbol obligation index helpers and fix re-registration stale index

Refactored SymbolObligationTracker to extract index management into two
dedicated methods:

- index_obligation_id(): adds an obligation ID to the by_symbol or
  by_object index based on the obligation kind variant
- remove_indexed_obligation_id(): removes an obligation ID from the
  appropriate index and cleans up empty entries

register() now handles re-registration of the same ObligationId:
- Before inserting, checks if an obligation with the same ID already
  exists and removes its index entry via remove_indexed_obligation_id()
- Then indexes the new obligation and inserts it
- Previously, re-registering the same ID with a different symbol/object
  would leave stale entries in the old index while adding to the new one,
  causing by_symbol/by_object lookups to return phantom obligations

resolve_obligation() now calls remove_indexed_obligation_id() instead
of inlining the same logic, deduplicating ~20 lines of match arms.

New test:
- test_register_same_id_reindexes_lookup: registers an obligation for
  symbol 11, then re-registers the same ID for symbol 12, verifying
  that by_symbol(11) is empty and by_symbol(12) returns the obligation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
